'''Gant''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who [[Kueller]] decided would replace [[Yanne]] as his advisor if he were to kill him. After Kueller's death, Yanne became the leader of [[Almania]]. Gant overthrew him and assumed leadership of the world, but was in turn overthrown by an unstable military junta.<ref name="New Rebellion" />
